This website uses cookies to ensure you get the best experience.

Vipo AS and our selected partners use cookies and similar technologies (together “cookies”) that are necessary to present this website, and to ensure you get the best experience of it. If you consent to it, we will also use cookies for analytics purposes.

See our Cookie Policy to read more about the cookies we set.

You can withdraw and manage your consent at any time, by clicking “Manage cookies” at the bottom of each website page.

Select which cookies you accept

On this site, we always set cookies that are strictly necessary, meaning they are necessary for the site to function properly.

If you consent to it, we will also set other types of cookies. You can provide or withdraw your consent to the different types of cookies using the toggles below. You can change or withdraw your consent at any time, by clicking the link “Manage Cookies”, which is always available at the bottom of the site.

To learn more about what the different types of cookies do, how your data is used when they are set etc, see our Cookie Policy.

These cookies are necessary to make the site work properly, and are always set when you visit the site.

Vendors Teamtailor

These cookies collect information to help us understand how the site is being used.

Mail
Business Group Applied Technologies · Drammen

Sales Manager – Applied Technologies

Our Applied Technologies team is looking for a motivated and commercially driven Sales Manager who will contribute to the future growth of our technology, products, and market presence.

Our Applied Technologies team is looking for a motivated and commercially driven Sales Manager who will contribute to the future growth of our technology, products, and market presence.

As part of the Applied Technologies team, consisting of sales, engineering, and project management professionals, you will be responsible for developing business opportunities in new and existing markets, with a particular focus on the Renewable and Defence sectors. You will play a key role in introducing our technology to new customers, developing strategic relationships, and identifying new business opportunities globally.

How will you do this?

  • Act as the primary contact for existing and potential customers during the early stages of the customer journey.

  • Build and maintain relationships with customers, partners, and key stakeholders in targeted industries.

  • Develop a strong understanding of market trends, customer needs, and competitor activities to identify new business opportunities.

  • Collaborate closely with engineering, project management, and marketing functions to support business growth and product development.

  • Contribute to the development and execution of sales and marketing strategies to increase lead generation and market penetration.

  • Meet with customers locally and internationally to understand their challenges and present our technology and solutions as a potential fit.

  • Support the expansion of Applied Technologies into new and unexplored market segments.

  • Participate in exhibitions, industry events, customer meetings, and technical presentations.

What we would like from you

  • Previous experience within technical sales, business development, or account management is an advantage.

  • Technical education and/or relevant technical experience.

  • Interest in technology and industrial applications.

  • Experience from Renewable Energy, Defence, Offshore, Marine, or other technical industries is beneficial.

  • Fluent English communication skills, both written and verbal.

  • IT experience with ERP, CRM, and Microsoft Office applications.

  • Strong customer-focused mindset.

  • Self-driven, proactive, and capable of working independently.

  • High integrity and strong relationship-building skills.

  • Willingness to travel domestically and internationally.

What we can offer you

  • Necessary and extensive training on products, processes, and technologies.

  • A central role in the continued growth of our Applied Technologies business.

  • Working with a professional and highly competent team in a dynamic organization.

  • Opportunity to contribute to business development and new technology applications.

  • Working with both local and global customers.

  • An informal and multinational work environment with Norwegian and English as working languages.

  • Office location and production facilities in Krokstadelva, just outside Drammen.

  • International responsibilities and opportunities for customer visits worldwide.

  • Electric vehicle charging points in the employee parking area.

  • Colleagues from 18 different countries.

  • Canteen with salad bar, hot meals, and cold food options.


Department
Business Group Applied Technologies
Contact Rikke Bakken Olsen HR Business Partner – People & Communication

Drammen

About Vipo AS

The Norwegian polymer specialist develops and manufactures rubber-based fire, thermal and corrosion protection products for global industries. With a portfolio of long-established brands including Vikotherm®, Vikodeck® and Elastopipe™, Vipo’s operation in Krokstadelva, Norway continues to provide innovative solutions to a variety of industries. 

Founded in 1896
Co-workers About 200

Our Applied Technologies team is looking for a motivated and commercially driven Sales Manager who will contribute to the future growth of our technology, products, and market presence.
